name: Cheese and Sausage Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sausage meat and onion in a blender if desired.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and mix well until the onion is finely ground.
3. Spoon the mixture from a teaspoon onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 425°F (four twenty-five degrees Fahrenheit) for 10-15 minutes, or until browned.
This is a QUICK and DELICIOUS snack, especially helpful during this time of year.
